QBM.CompositionApi.Captcha Namespace

Classes
  ClassDescription
CaptchaCode
CaptchaCodeAndAccount
CaptchaExtendedData
Configures an API method so that the client must supply a CAPTCHA code when calling the method.
CaptchaImage
HTTP service to generate a CAPTCHA image.
RecaptchaApiProvider
Configures the API project to use ReCAPTCHA validation.
RecaptchaApiProviderRecaptchaConfig
RecaptchaValidator
Validator for ReCAPTCHA codes.
Interfaces
  InterfaceDescription
ICaptchaImageService
Service that generates CAPTCHA-style images.
ICaptchaValidator
Represents the validator used to validate CAPTCHA codes generated by the CaptchaImage class.
